modification.name: Add Pick Up / Delivery Date to Orders and Admin Panel
modification.author: Mices Technology

operation.add:
{% if error_warehouse_id %}
{{ error_warehouse_id }}
{% endif %}
{% if error_delivery_zone_id %}
{{ error_delivery_zone_id }}
{% endif %}
AS user_group, (SELECT name FROM `" . DB_PREFIX . "warehouse` w WHERE w.warehouse_id = u.warehouse_id) AS name
$sql = "SELECT u.*, w.name as warehouse_name FROM `" . DB_PREFIX . "user` u LEFT JOIN `" . DB_PREFIX . "warehouse` w ON u.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id";

operation.search: $this->db->query("INSERT INTO `" . DB_PREFIX . "user` SET username = '" . $this->db->escape($data['username']) . "', user_group_id = '" . (int)$data['user_group_id'] . "', salt = '" . $this->db->escape($salt = token(9)) . "', password = '" . $this->db->escape(sha1($salt . sha1($salt . sha1($data['password'])))) . "', firstname = '" . $this->db->escape($data['firstname']) . "', lastname = '" . $this->db->escape($data['lastname']) . "', email = '" . $this->db->escape($data['email']) . "', image = '" . $this->db->escape($data['image']) . "', warehouse_id = '" . (int)$data['warehouse_id'] . "', status = '" . (int)$data['status'] . "', date_added = NOW()");

$this->db->query("UPDATE `" . DB_PREFIX . "user` SET username = '" . $this->db->escape($data['username']) . "', user_group_id = '" . (int)$data['user_group_id'] . "', firstname = '" . $this->db->escape($data['firstname']) . "', lastname = '" . $this->db->escape($data['lastname']) . "', email = '" . $this->db->escape($data['email']) . "', image = '" . $this->db->escape($data['image']) . "', warehouse_id = '" . (int)$data['warehouse_id'] . "', status = '" . (int)$data['status'] . "' WHERE user_id = '" . (int)$user_id . "'");

$query = $this->db->query("SELECT DISTINCT * FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product p LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "product_description pd ON (p.product_id = pd.product_id) WHERE p.product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "' AND pd.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "'");
operation.add: $query = $this->db->query(" SELECT DISTINCT p.*, pd.*, w.warehouse_id, w.name AS warehouse_name FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product p LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "product_description pd ON (p.product_id = pd.product_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "warehouse w ON (p.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id) WHERE p.product_id = '" . (int)$product_id . "' AND pd.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "'");

operation.search: $sql = "SELECT * FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product p LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "product_description pd ON (p.product_id = pd.product_id) WHERE pd.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "'";
operation.add: $sql = "SELECT p.*, pd.name AS product_name, w.name AS warehouse_name FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product p LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "product_description pd ON (p.product_id = pd.product_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "warehouse w ON (p.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id) WHERE pd.language_id = '" . (int)$this->config->get('config_language_id') . "'";

operation.search: $sql = "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_id) AS total FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product p LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "product_description pd ON (p.product_id = pd.product_id)
operation.add: $sql = "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_id) AS total FROM " . DB_PREFIX . "product p LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "product_description pd ON (p.product_id = pd.product_id) LEFT JOIN " . DB_PREFIX . "warehouse w ON (p.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id)

operation.search: <input type="text" name="manufacturer" value="{{ manufacturer }}" placeholder="{{ entry_manufacturer }}" id="input-manufacturer" class="form-control"/> <input type="hidden" name="manufacturer_id" value="{{ manufacturer_id }}"/>
<input type="text" name="filter_name" value="{{ filter_name }}" placeholder="{{ entry_name }}" id="input-name" class="form-control" />
{% if sort == 'pd.name' %} {{ column_name }} {% else %} {{ column_name }} {% endif %}
operation.add: {% if sort == 'p.warehouse' %} {{ column_warehouse }} {% else %} {{ column_warehouse }}{% endif %}

<script>
                // Show select warehouse if it is 'Processing Department'
                $(document).ready(function() {
                    var $userGroupInput = $('#input-user-group');
                    var $warehouseInput = $('#input-warehouse');
                    var $driverInput = $('#input-driver');

                    const checkWarehouseVisibility = () => {
                        // Warehouse
                        if ($userGroupInput.val() == '{{ config_user_group_wh }}') {
                          $warehouseInput.parent().parent().show(); 
                        } else {
                          $warehouseInput.val(null);
                          $warehouseInput.parent().parent().hide();
                        }
                              
                        // Driver
                        if ($userGroupInput.val() == '{{ config_user_group_driver }}') {
                          $driverInput.parent().parent().show(); 
                        } else {
                          $driverInput.val(null);
                          $driverInput.parent().parent().hide();
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if ($userGroupInput.val() == '{{ config_user_group_wh }}') {
                      $warehouseInput.parent().parent().show();
                    } 

                    if ($userGroupInput.val() == '{{ config_user_group_driver }}') {
                      $driverInput.parent().parent().show();
                    } 

                    $userGroupInput.on('change', checkWarehouseVisibility);
                });
            </script>
